2.description: get snow-avalanche hazard polygons (potensieltskredfareomr) with geometry

4.description: get buildings in Narvik by kommunenummer

5.description: find buildings that intersect reduced hazard polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per building (group by building objid)

7.description: count distinct buildings that intersect hazard areas
